headline: Your notes are done before you leave.
primary_text:
What would you do with 10 extra hours per week?

That's what JotPsych gives back to therapists who were drowning in documentation. No more staying late. No more notes on weekends. No more choosing between thorough documentation and your own mental health.

Our AI listens to your sessions and creates complete, HIPAA-compliant notes in the time it takes you to grab coffee. Built by people who understand behavioral health documentation isn't just checkboxes — it's clinical thinking.

See it in action.
